full_description: there are two blocks on the table, red is centered, pick the green block and stack it on the red block
schema: {A} notifies the red block, {B} notifies the green block, {a} notifies the arm to manipulate the green block
preference: num of words should not exceed 16. Degree of detail avg 7
seen: Use {a} to pick {B} and stack it on {A}.
Lift {B} with {a} and place it on top of {A}.
Grab {B} by {a} and set it above {A}.
Pick {B} with {a} and place it over {A}.
Take {B} with {a} and put it atop {A}.
unseen: Raise {B} by {a} and set it on {A}.
Reposition {B} with {a} to the top of {A}.
